name: rollback-policy
description: Rollback and recovery policy governing deployment revert, DNS cleanup, and domain unbinding procedures

policy.principle: Rollback is available for failed deployments but requires explicit approval. Rollback reverts deployment but preserves domain binding and DNS records.

trigger.description: Rollback is triggered manually after verification failure or explicit override

vercelRollback.description: Revert Vercel project to the last successful deployment. Project itself is preserved.

dnsCleanup.description: DNS records are NOT removed during rollback. Domain remains pointed to Vercel.

domainUnbinding.description: Domain remains bound to Vercel project during rollback.

verification.description: Post-rollback verification confirms the reverted deployment is live and accessible.

reporting.description: Rollback events are documented in delivery reports.
